text.title: Synthetic Users Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying synthetic-users. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team ships feature based on synthetic feedback; real users hate it.
Synthetic findings persist a year; nobody validated with real users.
Healthcare onboarding tested on synthetic users; vulnerable users misrepresented.
antipattern.fix: Block emit when high_stakes context flagged.

antipattern.symptom: All synthetic reactions confirm the team's beliefs; no surprises surfaced.
antipattern.fix: Require surprise_flag on every reaction; investigate when missing.
